name: createMonthlyStatisticalEntry

testSteps.description: Given that I'm logged in to 'Statistical Accounts' page

children.description: When i open page from sidebar menu: {General Ledger,Monthly Statistical Entries}

testSteps.description: Then the 'Statistical Entry - Monthly' page should show up
When I set the description to 'TEST1'

testSteps.description: Then the 'Statistical Entry Details - Monthly' should show up
When I set the Account Number to '01'
When I set the Units to '1000'
When I set the Cost Center to 'MAN5000'
When I set the Description to 'TEST1'
When I click on Save button
Then the 'Statistical Accounts Entry successfully created' modal should show up

title: Create monthly statistical entry
